headline: Costco Wholesale Corporation Reports April Sales Results
summary: ISSAQUAH, Wash., May 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Costco Wholesale Corporation (“Costco” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: COST) today reported net sales of $23.92 billion for the retail month of April, the four weeks ended May 3, 2026, an increase of 13.0 percent from $21.18 billion last year. Net sales for the first 35 weeks were $197.18 billion, an increase of 9.5 percent from $180.05 billion last year.
